body_txt: Shouting the word "NEVER!" to show a character is determined not to do something, and will proclaim it, usually either angrily or proudly. Note, without the determination being expressed, it's not this trope. It's just shouting a word that happens to be "NEVER!". Here is a compilation with a lot of examples. A Sub-Trope of Big Word Shout . May sometimes serve as a Heroic Vow of Defiance , depending on context. Frequently the setup for a Gilligan Cut . Compare Big "NO!" and Big "WHY?!" . Contrast Big "YES!" .
